[assembly: System.Runtime.CompilerServices.InternalsVisibleTo(@"NServiceBus.Transport.IBMMQ.Benchmarks, ")]
[assembly: System.Runtime.CompilerServices.InternalsVisibleTo(@"NServiceBus.Transport.IBMMQ.PerformanceTests, ")]
[assembly: System.Runtime.CompilerServices.InternalsVisibleTo(@"NServiceBus.Transport.IBMMQ.Tests, ")]
namespace NServiceBus.Transport.IBMMQ
{
    public sealed class IBMMQTransport : NServiceBus.Transport.TransportDefinition
    {
        public IBMMQTransport(System.Action<NServiceBus.Transport.IBMMQ.IBMMQTransportOptions> configure) { }
        public override System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection<NServiceBus.TransportTransactionMode> GetSupportedTransactionModes() { }
        public override System.Threading.Tasks.Task<NServiceBus.Transport.TransportInfrastructure> Initialize(NServiceBus.Transport.HostSettings hostSettings, NServiceBus.Transport.ReceiveSettings[] receivers, string[] sendingAddresses, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) { }
    }
    public class IBMMQTransportOptions
    {
        public IBMMQTransportOptions() { }
        public string? ApplicationName { get; set; }
        public string? Channel { get; set; }
        public int CharacterSet { get; set; }
        public string? CipherSpec { get; set; }
        public System.Collections.Generic.List<string> Connections { get; }
        public string? Host { get; set; }
        public int KeyResetCount { get; set; }
        public int MaxMessageLength { get; set; }
        public System.TimeSpan MessageWaitInterval { get; set; }
        public string? Password { get; set; }
        public int Port { get; set; }
        public string? QueueManagerName { get; set; }
        public NServiceBus.Transport.IBMMQ.SanitizeResourceName ResourceNameSanitizer { get; set; }
        public string? SslKeyRepository { get; set; }
        public string? SslPeerName { get; set; }
        public NServiceBus.Transport.IBMMQ.TopicNaming TopicNaming { get; set; }
        public NServiceBus.Transport.IBMMQ.TopicTopology Topology { get; set; }
        public string? User { get; set; }
    }
    public delegate string SanitizeResourceName(string queueName);
    public class TopicNaming
    {
        public TopicNaming(string topicPrefix = "DEV") { }
        public virtual string GenerateSubscriptionName(string endpointName, string topicString) { }
        public virtual string GenerateTopicName(System.Type eventType) { }
        public virtual string GenerateTopicString(System.Type eventType) { }
    }
    public abstract class TopicTopology
    {
        protected TopicTopology() { }
        public static NServiceBus.Transport.IBMMQ.TopicTopology TopicPerEvent() { }
    }
}
